MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TEACHER CREATED RESOURCES, INC. Notice Of Hearing Regarding Application For Partial Reconsideration

Off calendar. Dismissal as to all parties and causes of action entered on November 1, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2023 Continued To Jan-24-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Brian Johnson, Esq. 415-926-7247 Seven Hills LLP for Plaintiff.
Bailee Pelham, Esq. 949-760-1121 Buchalter for Defendant.

Argued. Ms. Pelham raises 2 issues. Mr. Johnson responds and agrees with the tentative rulings. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT TEACHER CREATED RESOURCES, INC.'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After the hearing, the Court signs an order.***
